description: You are a sociologist analyzing the transition from school to work using the 'mvad' dataset (McVicar and Anyadike-Danes, 2002). Identify distinct career trajectory typologies for 712 individuals by performing Sequence Analysis on the monthly activity logs (columns 17 to 86). Use Optimal Matching with a substitution cost of 2 and an indel cost of 1 to compute a dissimilarity matrix, then apply Hierarchical Clustering (Ward's method) to define 4 clusters. Save the cluster assignments, including the id and cluster number, to /home/ga/RProjects/output/career_clusters.csv. Calculate the mean time spent in each state for each cluster and save the results to /home/ga/RProjects/output/state_durations.csv. Generate a State Distribution Plot grouped by cluster and save it to /home/ga/RProjects/output/cluster_trajectories.png. Write your code in /home/ga/RProjects/sequence_analysis.R. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
